title: CHAMARA1989/prismos-ai

title: GabrielNetoAUT/tps.sh

summary: Integrate Ollama AI with Spring Boot to enable clean REST and UI endpoints for text and image generation using Java and Thymeleaf.

title: aaronphifer/triagewall
summary: Local-LLM alert triage for self-hosted SOCs. v0.1

title: JohnField07/AI-Bastion
summary: Protect autonomous AI agents on Linux with AI-Bastion’s 8-layer security system to prevent attacks, data theft, and supply chain risks.

title: xybrid-ai/xybrid
summary: Build apps powered by on-device AI

title: JessicaDaffinys/MiloAgent

title: FIRE-hub911/citation-assistant

title: sixtdreanight/Yanmo
summary: Yanmo (研墨) — Privacy-first research assistant. Paper tracking, formula verification, thesis writing. Runs locally.

title: marsyanggo/multi-agent-broker
summary: Make LLMs from different vendors collaborate as one team. Capability-based task routing across Claude / GPT / Gemini / Ollama. Lead dispatches → broker filter-broadcasts → workers (any LLM, any host) pick up matching tasks. Single-vendor stacks already have subagents — this is for when the right tool for the job lives in another vendor's stack.

title: goitno/deepworm
summary: Extract, analyze, and synthesize web data into detailed reports using deep learning without paid APIs or complex setup.

title: gitalex156/medical-document-ai-assistant
summary: Production-style AI assistant for medical document analysis using FastAPI, Streamlit, Ollama and RAG.

title: minouza/MathCrew
summary: Provide adaptive math tutoring for grades 1–6 using AI agents that generate problems, analyze errors, and guide student practice.

title: aashima/cognithor
summary: Build and run autonomous AI agents locally for experimentation and personal automation with secure, multi-channel support and layered cognitive memory.

title: project-nomos/nomos
summary: Your AI digital clone — learns who you are, acts on your behalf, remembers everything. Persistent vector memory, multi-agent teams, 60+ skills, smart model routing. Self-hosted, encrypted, multi-provider (Claude/Ollama/OpenRouter). Deploy to Slack, Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp & more in minutes.

title: felixgeelhaar/nomi
summary: Local-first, state-driven AI agent platform. Plan-review before execution, capability-gated tools, BYO LLM (Ollama / Anthropic / OpenAI). Tauri desktop + Go runtime.
